name: Southwest Vipassana Meditation Center
description: Southwest Vipassana Meditation Center (Dhamma Siri) is a Vipassana meditation center in Kaufman, Texas, offering 10-day silent meditation courses in the tradition of S.N. Goenka. Located on 138 acres east of Dallas, it is one of the largest Goenka Vipassana centers in North America. All courses are offered on a donation basis.
